name: 11L Int5-All + LN Scale + Partial RoPE + XSA6 + Adaptive Prune + Causal TTT (60 epochs, 64 chunks, LR=0.010)
blurb: 11 layers with int5 quantization for all weight categories + other. LN Scale (1/sqrt(layer+1)). Partial RoPE (12 of 64 dims). EMA (decay=0.997) for model averaging. Adaptive magnitude pruning to guarantee under-16MB. Exclusive Self-Attention on last 6 layers. Legal causal test-time training: chunk-based eval-then-train on validation data (64 chunks, 60 SGD epochs per chunk, LR=0.010). Muon WD=0.08. SmearGate + OrthoInit + zstd-22.
author: devin-ai
